## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss organic growth strategies for Surge AI's recruitment efforts, leveraging GrowthX Labs' expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge AI's current recruitment relies heavily on paid ads; opportunity to diversify with organic strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - GrowthX Labs proposes content-driven approach, leveraging Surge's domain authority (55 pages, ranks \#1 for "data annotation")
  - [Focus on creating high-quality, scalable content targeting specific audience segments (e.g., multilingual, STEM experts)](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Prioritize building out website content before expanding to video/UGC; aim for quality over quantity in recruitment](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

## Topics

### Current Recruitment Landscape

  - [Surge AI dominates traffic but relies mainly on paid ads](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Competitors (e.g., Mercor) use referral programs effectively](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Aligner improved creative quality; Handshake and Mercor gaining organic attention](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Surge expanded beyond native English speakers to multilingual and STEM experts](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Surge doesn't use agencies for recruitment (unlike Scale AI)](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Approach to Organic Growth

  - [Research audience-specific questions and become the best answer programmatically](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - Leverage Surge's existing domain authority (ranks \#1 for "data annotation")
  - [Create topic clusters and content types (e.g., how-tos, comparisons) based on audience research](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Use agentic workflows and human editors to scale high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Example: Tiro's success in ranking for specific salary-related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)

### Content Strategy and Scaling

  - [Surge has only 55 pages; 96% of traffic from "data annotation" keyword](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Opportunity to expand content significantly (e.g., Handshake has 45,000 pages, 1,000 blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [GrowthX's platform includes dashboards, custom knowledge bases, and detailed workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Focus on creating content that can be cited in AI-powered search results (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude)](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Leverage dataannotation.tech as a perceived third-party site for credibility](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)

### Video Content Considerations

  - [YouTube is the second-largest search engine](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Videos increasingly cited in search results](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Priority should be on building out website content before expanding to video](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

### Recruitment Goals and Priorities

  - [Focus on efficient recruitment targeting the right people, not just volume](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Consider prioritizing specific multilingual cohorts or high-need/high-CAC segments](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Balance between quantity and quality of recruits](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up a Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Surge AI to provide deep dive or interview-style context on target audiences and recruitment nuances](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to start research and present initial content strategy and volume estimates by early next week](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Align on specific goals and select 1-2 cohorts to focus on initially](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Explore leveraging Surge's existing user base (hundreds of thousands) for content and recruitment strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Tkec7yG7m5gu3ssSmpoGLaPsB-sNGqSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
